title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies family as a Teacher in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
